round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent successfully integrated cross-domain evidence (Botanics' palm ID, Meta's fencing) to reinforce its initial high-confidence hypothesis.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent effectively synthesized landscape and meta observations to strengthen its botanical diagnosis of the location.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent improved by explicitly using the driving side (RHT) to rule out Thailand (LHT), a strong logical deduction.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent reinforced its conclusion by synthesizing the specific architectural markers identified by other agents.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the consensus among the active agents. It explicitly utilized the regulatory agent's driving side evidence to eliminate Thailand, demonstrating strong evidence weighting and logical elimination.
